Description: REQUIRES MORE ENEMY VARIANTS (MEV), DEA and EEE. A fork of FC_b23 which throws almost every enemy variant on top of some custom ones at you
Name: ENND v1.69

WaveSpawners.Name: Spawns a Dreadnaught helper during Elimination
Spawns a Harvester and Maggots enemy on a 5min timer, cuz why not
Spawns Ebonite Praets on a 90-120s timer
Spawns a Menace on a 120-180s timer
Spawns a group of Spitters/Mactera on a 80-110s timer, starting 25s into the mission
Spawns Weak Twins, disabled in Elimination/Dread)
Spawns a few mini bugs 60-120s timer
Spawns a group of grunts on a 60-80s timer, starting 25s into the mission
